summary: Replace ambiguous vertical swipes with a thumb-index pinch-and-drag continuous scrolling control.
scope: recognize thumb-index pinch and draw its yellow midpoint marker
scroll the controlled page continuously while the pinch is held
reserve open-palm swipes for left and right page navigation
notes: Hold a thumb-index pinch for about 80ms before moving vertically.
Move hand up to move the page up; release the pinch to stop immediately.
